name: property managers handling 10-20 tenant screenings/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 tenant screenings/month, manual tracking causes delays in tenant approvals. We automate the scheduling and sending of reports instead of manual tracking and emailing of reports.
problem_solved: Inefficient scheduling and sending of tenant screening reports

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient scheduling and sending of tenant screening reports
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 10-20 tenant screenings/month, manual tracking causes delays in tenant approvals. We automate the scheduling and sending of reports instead of manual tracking and emailing of reports.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking and emailing of reports

one_liner: For property managers processing 10-20 tenant screenings/month, manual tracking causes delays in tenant approvals. We automate the scheduling and sending of reports instead of manual tracking and emailing of reports.
